🏠 Real Estate Showcase

Freelance site for a realtor to feature recently sold properties and capture fresh buyer and seller leads. Built for quick content updates, strong credibility signals, and a frictionless mobile lead form.

Visit Site →

🤖 Gemini AI Clone

Gemini AI Clone With the growing demand for AI technologies, I’ve been eager to build and practice through hands-on projects. As part of my AI Engineering journey, I followed a tutorial to create a Gemini AI clone. This project utilizes OpenAI’s API and demonstrates how to recreate a simplified version of Google’s Gemini AI. It gave me deeper insight into how AI models work behind the scenes and how user input is processed and transformed into meaningful responses. Exploring the internal workings of AI has been both educational and fascinating. I’m excited to continue learning and building more AI-powered projects.

Visit Site →

About Me

I’m a passionate Full-Stack Software Developer based in Victorville, CA, with certifications from Codecademy, Scrimba and Mimo. As a self-taught developer, I have built a strong foundation in programming languages such as Python, JavaScript, and TypeScript, along with experience working with databases like MySQL and PostgreSQL. My expertise extends to web development technologies, including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, allowing me to create dynamic and responsive applications. Driven by a commitment to continuous learning, I am always expanding my skill set and refining my expertise in software development. When I’m not coding, I enjoy working out, watching movies like Star Wars or Lord of the Rings and playing video games. Currently, I am seeking opportunities to grow my career, enhance my technical skills, and contribute to innovative projects in the industry.

Education | Certificates

Get in Touch

Are you looking for a passionate and dedicated developer to join your team? I’m eager to bring my skills in full-stack development to a dynamic workplace where I can contribute, learn, and grow. If you have an opportunity, questions, or even advice to share, I’d love to hear from you! Feel free to reach out—I’m excited to connect and explore new possibilities. The fastest way to contact me is via email. 😊
